title: Greatest Marriage Proposal EVER!!!
text: is [Music] a love story so true it couldn't have been written I know how much she means to you I know how much you love her I know she is your heart there comes a time when every father lets his little girl go I just want you to know that I love her too and I am by no means trying to steal her away from you to another man that loves her as much as he does I want to spend the rest of my life with her she is my heart my friend my everything it's a story about two people who find true love right around the corner she is nothing like any woman I've ever met before and everything I've always wanted in more that teaches us everyone out there does have a soulmate I want you to know that I'll protect her I will honor and respect her and treat her the way she deserves to be treated and that every true love story isn't in the movies I didn't even know what real love is but she is showing me and teaching me every day it might be oldfashioned it may not even be necessary but it's important to me and I know it's important to your daughter that I do this as well I'd like to have your blessing sir may I have your daughter's hand in marriage you have my permission for a hand in marriage I would love to have you as a [Music] son-in-law coming this winner from Universal Studios making the movies jealous what are you waiting for you [Music] [Music] okay I get um uh let me just get a small pop and [Applause] [Music] Virginia Le Jer since our second day I've always said that we were going to be making the movies jealous you mean everything to me and I meant that will you give me the honor and will you marry me [Applause] bra got one more fing players with [Applause] [Music] Rel what you talking about you [Music] we ain't [Music] girl me we ain't no might as well mared Baby Let's Get Married check it out I done it all frankly girl I'm tired of this emptiness I want to come home to you and only you why [Music]
